checkpoint.summary: unit_027 complete. Appended a new '## Orchestrator vs sub-agent boundary' section to templates/claude-code/rules/harness-core.md with the three phase-doc-required bullets: (1) only the orchestrator modifies .harness/ or runs git merge; (2) sub-agents commit only within their worktree branch and never push/rebase/reset --hard; (3) a worktree containing .harness/WORKTREE_UNIT.json is a fan-out environment so follow the harness-unit contract exactly. Each bullet names the concrete enforcement mechanism (scope-violation check + .harness/.lock mutex; pre-created branch; sentinel-based agent self-identification). Docs-only; 171/171 tests unchanged.
checkpoint.next_action: Complete unit_028 (PHASE_006): mirror the three orchestrator-vs-sub-agent boundary bullets into the Cursor rule file skills/development-harness/templates/rules/harness-core.mdc (Cursor does not have a native Agent primitive, so the rules-level constraint IS the Cursor equivalent for orchestrator/sub-agent boundary enforcement).
